chunks.title: Instruction to Moses
chunks.reason: Yahweh instructs Moses about the final plague and the request for silver and gold.

chunks.title: Moses' Prophecy to Pharaoh
chunks.reason: Moses delivers Yahweh's oracle regarding the death of the firstborn and the departure of Israel.

chunks.title: Hardening of Pharaoh's Heart
chunks.reason: Narrative conclusion describing Moses' actions and the hardening of Pharaoh's heart.
